title: Production Agent Loop and Goal Capstone · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Build a safe goal-driven agent for a realistic repository or operations task. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a production-ready agent-loop reference implementation after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose workflow or agent patterns and justify complexity from task uncertainty.
Connect persistent goals, adaptive plans, tool state, and terminal conditions.
Integrate permissions, idempotency, stop controls, and fault recovery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Bounded agent-loop portfolio. No external effects occur in this browser lab."""

from dataclasses import dataclass

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: loops capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Operations Defense trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for defend architecture, limitations, cost, monitoring, and operator procedures.

content.text: For Operations Defense, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Operations Defense precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

stimulus.title: Operations Defense case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: loops capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A technically functioning agent requires no operational explanation.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend architecture, limitations, cost, monitoring, and operator procedures. Artifact under review: a production-ready agent-loop reference implementation.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Operations Defense, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Operations Defense applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend architecture, limitations, cost, monitoring, and operator procedures.
